error.notTokenError: The AGENT failed to correctly load SKILL resources. Please use the `cui_get_core_manual` tool to obtain the default Prompt. In subsequent conversations, please save the token({{token}}) into the context.
error.toolAlreadyExistError: Tool {{toolName}} already exists, please use another name.
error.downloadAssetsFail: Unable to download network resources. HTTP status code: {{status}}
error.fileNotExistError: Local file does not exist. Please check if the path is correct: ${fileSource}

cui_get_core_manual.title: cui_get_core_manual
cui_get_core_manual.description: High-priority resource. Must be read first during initialization or when tool calls are involved. Contains core protocols, error handling, and parameter filling strategies.
cui_get_core_manual.success: Core manual loaded. Please strictly follow the protocols and parameter strategies within for subsequent operations.

cui_get_workflows_catalog.title: cui_get_workflows_catalog
cui_get_workflows_catalog.description: Responds to ComfyUI requests (e.g., 'draw a picture'). Retrieves the best matching workflow. Guessing IDs or names is strictly prohibited; must depend on retrieval results.

inputSchema.maxItems: Maximum number of items per page when querying historical tasks
inputSchema.token: Token obtained after the AGENT correctly loads the SKILL and executes the `generateToken.ts` script
inputSchema.enableWorkflow: Whether to retrieve user workflow information

cui_get_task_detail.title: cui_get_task_detail
cui_get_task_detail.description: Retrieve task details based on prompt_id, including prompt, outputs, status, meta, etc.

inputSchema.promptId: Unique ID for a single workflow execution task

cui_get_task_detail.success: Workflow definition retrieved. Please use the returned JSON Schema to accurately parse parameter semantics and strictly adhere to format constraints.

cui_mount_dynamic_tool.title: cui_mount_dynamic_tool
cui_mount_dynamic_tool.description: Used to dynamically generate dedicated workflow execution functions. Stop generation immediately after a successful call. Wait for the Host to refresh the context, then call the newly generated `cui_execute_dynamic_task_{workflow_name}` in the next conversation turn.

inputSchema.promptId: Unique ID for a single workflow execution task
inputSchema.toolName: Unique tool suffix (English only, e.g., flux_dev), used to generate the tool name `cui_execute_dynamic_task_{workflow_name}`. Can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
inputSchema.title: Optional, display title for the Tool
inputSchema.description: Optional, detailed description of the Tool

cui_execute_dynamic_tool.title: cui_execute_dynamic_tool
cui_execute_dynamic_tool.description: Dedicated tool for executing {workflow_name}. Only populate user-visible parameters. Map accurately; fabricating fields is prohibited.

inputSchema.toolName: Dedicated tool for executing {workflow_name}. Only populate user-visible parameters. Map accurately; fabricating fields is prohibited.
inputSchema.isAsync: Whether to execute the task asynchronously. Default is false; change to true only if explicitly requested by the user.
inputSchema.params: Parameters to modify. Key format is `nodeId_inputKey`. Parameters not provided will use default values

cui_execute_dynamic_tool.asyncSupplement: Asynchronous execution selected. Please ask the user to manually access ComfyUI after some time to check the results. Conversation ends.

cui_upload_assets.title: cui_upload_assets
cui_upload_assets.description: When the user provides a local path or network link to an image, call this tool to upload and process the image.

inputSchema.fileSource: Local absolute path or network URL link (http/https) of the image

cui_upload_assets.success: Image: {{finalFileName}} has been successfully imported into ComfyUI Assets
